global.description: The ad features a prominent logo, product placeholder, and clear call-to-action buttons.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock with free shipping offers.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BoltCart' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular placeholder for a product image, located in the center of the ad, with a light background.

elements.label: Limited stock text
elements.description: Text reading 'Limited stock' in a prominent font, centered within the ad.

elements.label: Free shipping text
elements.description: Text stating 'Free shipping over $25' in a smaller font, positioned below the 'Limited stock' text.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, circular element that appears to be a decorative feature, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Text that emphasizes urgency with 'Limited stock' in a large, eye-catching font at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo of 'BoltCart' displayed at the top of the ad, featuring a modern design.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, BoltCart logo, limited stock message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the product placeholder is in the center, and the call-to-action buttons are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BoltCart, Limited stock, Free shipping over $25, Watch now
